name: han
description: Han's skill set for building self-learning, on-demand-split skills.

interface.longDescription: Han's Codex skill collection. Ships skill-creator-plus — a factory for skills with feedback-loop self-learning and on-demand file-split architecture (SKILL.md router + workflows/ steps).
defaultPrompt: Create a self-learning skill with a feedback loop
Split a bloated SKILL.md into on-demand files
Add self-learning to an existing skill
